title: Pod create 502 + controlnet_aux install fail
description: Renting a Pod (RTX PRO 4500, EU-RO-1) to test samplers. Chain of failures: (1) POST /remote/pod/create returned 502 Bad Gateway repeatedly + WS-token fetch failed (event channel unavailable) — likely transient RunPod stock/gateway (ties to project_reconnect_deletes_warm_pod). (2) Connecting to the raw ComfyUI web UI directly showed 67 errors 'nodes missing' — MpiNodes (MpiMath etc.) absent, plus a Krea2 dep install error for comfyui_controlnet_aux. ROOT CAUSE (corrected by user): the MpiNodes pack IS present on the Pod, but the current workflow uses a FEW NEW nodes added in a recent pack update (extra image-processing nodes) that the Pod's PINNED MpiNodes version predates. MpiNodes is code-only, installed to the network VOLUME at connect-time by the wrapper (NOT baked, per start.sh:238 / MPI-222), and node_lock.json pins its commit. FIX PATH: release the MpiNodes update + bump node_lock.json pin so the connect-time install pulls the version containing the new nodes. SECONDARY: harden create so a 502 doesn't silently abort the whole connect-time node/model install chain (the 502 is what left the Pod bare). Files: c:\AI\Mpi\mpi-ci\cubric-vision-pod\start.sh, node_lock.json, wrapper/wrapper.py; MpiNodes repo github.com/MadPonyInteractive/ComfyUi-MpiNodes.
